title: Handling of rdf_strlang_impl in OPTIONAL
key_bug_features: BIND with STRLANG on optional NULL variable
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE persons (id INT PRIMARY KEY, first_name VARCHAR(100));
CREATE TABLE functions (id INT PRIMARY KEY, function_name VARCHAR(100));
INSERT INTO functions (id, function_name) VALUES (1, 'Developer'), (2, NULL);
SELECT p.first_name, IF(BOUND(f.function_name), STRLANG(f.function_name, 'nl'), NULL) AS function_label FROM persons p LEFT JOIN functions f ON p.id = f.id;
